text:
Coverage Indicator — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is a monthly variable that indicates whether the beneficiary was enrolled in traditional 
Medicare fee-for-service (FFS), or whether the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicare advantage (MA) 
managed care plan. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = not Medicare FFS during month 
1 = Medicare FFS during the month 
Null/missing = not Medicare enrolled for the month 

COMMENT: CCW creates this
